# Learn2FlyFlorida

> FAA Part 61 flight training in Lake City, Florida (Lake City Gateway Airport, KLCQ). One-on-one instruction from an airline-experienced, Gold Seal flight instructor covering Private Pilot, Instrument, Commercial, and CFI training paths. One instructor, one aircraft, one standard.

Learn2FlyFlorida is a small, owner-operated flight school. Students train directly with Ralph, a Gold Seal Flight Instructor and ATP, from the first lesson through their checkride. Training is conducted in a modernized 1969 Piper Cherokee 140 (N833WT) and a Redbird FMX simulator. Pricing is transparent and pay-as-you-go.

## Contact
- Phone: 386-965-1502
- Email: info@Learn2FlyFlorida.com
- Address: 219 SW Plantation Terrace, Lake City, Florida 32025
- Airport: KLCQ - Lake City Gateway

## Pages
- [Home](https://learn2flyflorida.com/): Overview of the school, training philosophy, and contact.
- [About](https://learn2flyflorida.com/about): Instructor background, FAA certificates, and training standards.
- [Courses](https://learn2flyflorida.com/courses): Private Pilot, Instrument Rating, Commercial Pilot, and CFI training paths with milestones.
- [Rates](https://learn2flyflorida.com/rates): Transparent aircraft rental, instruction, ground, and simulator pricing.
- [Aircraft](https://learn2flyflorida.com/aircraft): Details and avionics for the Piper Cherokee 140 trainer.
- [Resources](https://learn2flyflorida.com/resources): FAA handbooks, ACS links, weather tools, and pre-training requirements.
- [FAQ](https://learn2flyflorida.com/faq): Answers on schedule, checkrides, payment, and expectations.
- [Contact](https://learn2flyflorida.com/contact): Form, phone, and email to reserve training or a discovery flight.

## Training Paths
- Private Pilot: Typical 45-55 hrs. Foundation certificate for safe personal flying.
- Instrument Rating: Typical 40 hrs. Real IFR capability with up to 10 hrs in the Redbird FMX.
- Commercial Pilot: Skill refinement to ACS commercial standards.
- Flight Instructor (CFI): Instructor preparation including Fundamentals of Instruction and spin endorsement.

## Key Facts
- FAA Part 61 training.
- Discovery Flight Lesson: $159 flat.
- Aircraft: 1969 Piper Cherokee 140, $150/hr wet.
- Pay-as-you-go; no requirement to pay in advance.

## Optional
- [Legal](https://learn2flyflorida.com/legal): Privacy policy, terms of use, cookie notice, accessibility statement, and safety disclaimer.
